modernia.name: Modernia

findings: S2a hitRatePct restored from unmodeled (hard rule 4) + S2b ATK+29.38 gated inFb (was ungated over-credit) -> board 1.069->1.044 (into +/-5%); F1 Destroy Mode 2.24%/hit rides crit-OFF path but U1 says function-dmg crits (would warm; not pulled)

0.88 COLD masking-case (2026-07-17): naga's 'auto' no-op default removed her phantom with-shielder team buff (coreDamagePct 85.17 + burst casterAtkPct to all allies) that was propping modernia in N2 — her reading fell 1.0437→0.8807, exposing her own under-model (helm/crown masking pattern). Candidate cause: hitRatePct→core-hit-rate (backlog engine-gap #2); Destroy Mode function damage crit-OFF (theme 12). See docs/engine-modeling-gaps.md.

modernia.residual: Single read, confounded by that comp FB-count anomaly

burst: Destroy Mode: Extends her line of sight and auto-aims at all enemies within range. The stage target is treated as a single enemy regardless of whether it has parts (including interruption parts).

caveats: skill1: reload tuple is unverified datamine — reloadFrames 159 + rolling-reload (reload_start_ammo 299); read the reload gap from any focus video (⚑1)
skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 8.56% is modeled but INERT in the engine — it raises the core-hit rate by an unmeasured magnitude (⚑2)

skill2: the ATK ▲ 29.38% 'during increasing Hit Rate status' gate is approximated as in-Full-Burst — exact when Modernia bursts (extended FB ≡ the 15s status), undercounts the 5s status tail on rotations another Burst III unit bursts (⚑3)

burst: Destroy Mode per-hit 2.24% is modeled crit-OFF (hand-authored extraHitDamagePct path); U1 says function additional damage crits — unreconciled finding, and the datamined ChangeWeapon (shot 1026002) fire profile is assumed identical to the base MG (⚑4)
